info.title: SeatGeek Events & Ticket Listings Dataset
info.subtitle: Daily sample of SeatGeek events, ticket listings, performers, and venues with
info.description:
Comprehensive SeatGeek marketplace dataset containing millions of ticket transactions, Deal Score analytics, and venue performance metrics. Includes detailed event categorization, performer popularity rankings, and geographic demand patterns across all entertainment verticals.

Pre-processed data featuring SeatGeek's unique value scoring system, seat map analytics, and customer behavior insights. Perfect for building predictive models around ticket demand, venue optimization, and entertainment market forecasting.
info.userSpecifiedSources: Data is collected via automated web scraping of publicly accessible pages and APIs.
